title: Holodrive
description:
A high-speed 2D multiplayer shooter where you design and customize your robot. Gear up, jetpack around, and race to victory! 

Jump in - It's Free to Play, now with Cocoball!Holodrive is free to play, and you don’t need to spend a dime to keep things fair. You can collect all combat items just by playing! Dive into Deathmatch or try one of the three team-based modes, including the new Cocoball, for a cluckin' good time! 

The Rise of the Explosive DummiesWhen Holocorp made the Dummies, they intended them to be the ultimate companion robots—man's new best friend. Who knew they’d end up obsessed with blowing each other up in style? Now, decked out in flashy gear and armed with guns and wild power-ups, these robots battle it in crazy arenas to prove who's the best. What could go wrong? 

Non-Stop Multiplayer ActionThe action in Holodrive is fast, strategic, and packed with explosions! You'll quickly get into the groove of blowing each other up, and when you do, you'll respawn in no time to keep the chaos going. Use the map to your advantage—teleport into the thick of the fight or duck behind anti-bullet barriers to surprise your enemies!

Become a Weapon CollectorYou can carry up to 7 weapons at once. Scavenge weapons and ammo as you navigate the levels, or grab them from the enemies you take down. Score new weapons by opening packs, crafting them, or snagging the free weapon that rotates every 3 days!

Mobility, Versatility, UnpredictabilityEvery Dummy comes with a jetpack, letting you zip around the arena with speed. The fast-paced action is enhanced by ramps and power-ups placed strategically, adding an element of surprise that can instantly change the game. 

Customize and Show off your Stylish SelfCustomize everything from your hat to your jetpack! Open Holopacks to get complete sets like Shinobi or Ninja, or mix and match parts to make a bold fashion statement that stands out in the arena.
description_short: A fast-paced multiplayer shooter where you customize your robot, zoom around with a jetpack, and battle with various weapons. Master the arenas, surprise your enemies, and enjoy the nonstop action!
